title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - AWS Cloud Architecture & Services
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 12 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 93.3%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 83.3%, and average score is 7.32/10. Total training hours are 224 and scaled cost is 11. Overall effectiveness classification is Risk. Management interpretation: The training program for the AWS Cloud Architecture & Services course has achieved a high attendance rate of 93.3% and a completion rate of 100%. However, the overall pass rate of 83.3% indicates that some trainees did not meet the expected performance threshold, contributing to a classification of Risk in effectiveness. The average score of 7.32/10 and a feedback rating of 4.71/5 suggest that while the course content is well-received, there are areas for improvement in trainee understanding and retention.
insights: AWS Cloud Architecture & Services has an effectiveness score of 85.76 in the selected scope.
2 outstanding trainees met the star learner rule: score >= 9.0 and full attendance.
2 high-priority L&D NORM flags were triggered.
The course had a total of 12 trainees, with 2 identified as needing additional support due to their performance being below the pass threshold.
The total training hours amounted to 224, with a scaled cost of 11.
The effectiveness score of 85.76 reflects a need for targeted interventions to enhance learning outcomes, particularly for those at risk of underperformance.
recommendations: Assign a coaching owner, buddy support, and targeted practice resources for the flagged learner.
A review of course content may also be beneficial to ensure alignment with trainee needs and improve overall pass rates.

checklist.detail: Required sheets and columns were mapped from Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count x total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one valid assessment and pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
Duplicate rows and numeric ranges were checked before metric generation.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID and pass-status logic
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the selected course catalog.
